How quickly will you respond to inquiries?Our team typically responds within 12–24 hours during business days. For urgent enquiries, call us directly at +91 80557 54054.02. Do you offer free consultations?Yes, we provide a free digital marketing strategy consultation for new clients. Book your session to get a customised growth plan for your business.03. What services does Growthik Media provide?SEO, Social Media Marketing, PPC / Google Ads, Website Development, Branding & Design and E-Commerce Solutions - serving businesses across Pune and India.04. Do you work with businesses outside Pune?Yes, we scale businesses across India and globally. While headquartered in Pune, we serve clients in Mumbai, Bangalore, Delhi and internationally.05. What is the cost of digital marketing services in Pune?Our packages are customised based on your business goals, competition and channels. Contact us for a free consultation and a tailored proposal.06. How long does it take to see results from digital marketing?SEO typically delivers measurable results in 3–6 months. PPC and Google Ads can generate leads within 2–4 weeks. Social media growth depends on content strategy and ad spend.
